name: The Brief — Daily Car Business News

nodes.name: Google News RSS
nodes.notes: Add more rssFeedRead nodes (FTC, IRS, CFPB, NADA) + a Merge node to widen coverage. See docs/news-pipeline.md §4.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-5', max_tokens: 4000, system: "You are the editor of 'The Brief', Jonathan Lopez's car-business news desk. Keep ONLY items useful to a U.S. car buyer or the car business (financing specials by brand, credit-union/bank rates, FTC/CFPB/IRS regulation, market trends). Discard opinion, ads, duplicates. For each kept item output an object with EXACTLY: id (kebab slug), category (one of financiamiento|marcas|regulacion|irs|bancos|mercado), categoryLabel (short display label), titleEs (Spanish headline), titleEn (English headline), whyEs (one Spanish sentence, why it matters, tie to negotiating a better deal), source, url, publishedAt (ISO). SUMMARIZE, never copy text. Do NOT invent numbers/APRs/prices not present in the source. Return ONLY a JSON array of 8-14 items.", messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Raw headlines JSON:\n' + JSON.stringify($json.candidates) }] }) }}

nodes.name: Claude — Curate & Translate
nodes.notes: Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in n8n env. Model claude-sonnet-5 is a good cost/quality fit for daily curation.

nodes.name: Upload to Vercel Blob
nodes.notes: Stable path news/feed.json (x-add-random-suffix: 0) keeps NEWS_FEED_URL constant. Response .url is the public URL.
